title: Canonical Hook Input
description: Normalized JSON that adapters produce on stdin for hook scripts. See docs/canonical-contract.md for full specification.

event.description: Canonical event name. Currently only 'before_shell_execution' is supported.

type.description: Action category as defined by the IDE's hook system. Currently only 'command' (shell execution) is supported.

workspace_roots.description: Absolute paths to workspace root directories. Empty array if the IDE does not provide workspace info.

cwd.description: Current working directory of the action. Falls back to the first workspace_roots entry if the IDE payload omits it. Empty string only when truly unavailable.

command.description: Shell command string about to be executed.

tool_name.description: IDE tool identifier from the payload (e.g. 'Bash', 'run_in_terminal'). Empty string when not applicable.

raw_payload.description: The original, unmodified JSON payload from the IDE, preserved verbatim.
